---
title: "Computational Statistics and Monte Carlo Methods"
subtitle: "CORE-015 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "The computational methods that make modern statistics possible. Monte Carlo, bootstrap, EM algorithm, and the theory behind simulation-based inference."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Computational Statistics and Monte Carlo Methods

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
